reference: I am a sixteen-year-old girl. I have been unable to run for four years. My legs are weak. I was diagnosed with spondylolisthesis last year. They said I would be okay within a week or a month, but that hasn't happened. I have my physical education practical next month, and I do not want to be embarrassed in front of my friends. Please help.
text: I am a sixteen-year-old girl. I have been unable to run for four years. My legs are weak. I was diagnosed with spinal atresias last year. They said I would be okay within a week or a month, but that hasn't happened. I have my physical education practical next month, and I do not want to be embarrassed in front of my friends. Please help.
